requirement: Fix port collision, add gateway routes, add DB stores, wire e2e tests

tasks.title: Fix port collision 8085→8089 + add gateway backend entry
tasks.description:
Fix the securities-service port collision and wire it into the gateway.

Part A — Port fix:
- src/securities-service/cmd/securities-service/main.go: change default API_PORT from 8085 to 8089, HEALTH_PORT from 9085 to 9089
- src/securities-service/Dockerfile: change EXPOSE from 8085 9085 to 8089 9089
- docker-compose.yml: change securities-service ports from 8085:8085 to 8089:8089, health port from 9085 to 9089, healthcheck URL to port 9089

Part B — Gateway backend entry:
- src/gateway/cmd/gateway/main.go: add securities-service to the backendClient map (around line 48): "securities-service": fmt.Sprintf("http://%s", strings.Replace(cfg.SecuritiesServiceAddr, ":50059", ":8089", 1))
- src/gateway/internal/config/config.go: add SecuritiesServiceAddr field with env var SECURITIES_SERVICE_ADDR, default "securities-service:50059"
- docker-compose.yml gateway service: add SECURITIES_SERVICE_ADDR env var

Part C — Gateway proxy routes:
- Read src/gateway/internal/handler/handler.go to understand how routes are registered
- Read src/gateway/internal/proxy/ to understand how the BackendClient proxies requests
- Add securities routes to the gateway that proxy to securities-service:
  - /api/v1/securities/instruments/* → securities-service
  - /api/v1/securities/orders/* → securities-service
  - /api/v1/securities/positions/* → securities-service
  - /api/v1/securities/settlements/* → securities-service
  - /api/v1/securities/corporate-actions/* → securities-service
- Follow the pattern of existing route registrations (matching-engine, clearing-engine routes)

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/gateway && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: DB store for instruments and orders
tasks.description:
Add PostgreSQL-backed store implementations for the securities-service, following the database/sql + pgx/v5/stdlib pattern used by existing services.

Read .softhouse/patterns.md — the pattern says: 'database/sql + pgx/v5/stdlib — every service uses the same driver approach'
Read src/shared/internal/db/ for the shared DB pool setup pattern.
Read an existing service's store implementation (e.g., src/matching-engine/internal/store/ or src/gateway/internal/tickets/) for the SQL query pattern.

Create src/securities-service/internal/store/pg_store.go:

1. PgInstrumentStore struct with *sql.DB field
2. Implement InstrumentStore interface:
   - Create: INSERT INTO securities.instruments with all fields, RETURNING *
   - Get: SELECT * FROM securities.instruments WHERE id = $1
   - List: SELECT with optional WHERE clauses for asset_class, trading_status, exchange_code, search (ILIKE on ticker/name), LIMIT/OFFSET
   - Update: UPDATE SET for non-zero fields, WHERE id = $1
   - UpdateStatus: UPDATE SET trading_status = $1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2
3. PgOrderStore struct with *sql.DB field
4. Implement OrderStore interface:
   - Submit: INSERT INTO securities.orders with all fields, RETURNING *
   - Get: SELECT * FROM securities.orders WHERE id = $1
   - List: SELECT with optional WHERE for instrument_id, status, participant_id, LIMIT/OFFSET
   - Cancel: UPDATE SET status = 'CANCELLED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1 AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PARTIALLY_FILLED')

Table names from infrastructure/db/migrations/V26-V27: securities.instruments, securities.orders
Column names from docs/securities-architecture.md section 9.

Use database/sql only (no pgx import in this file). The connection is passed in as *sql.DB.

Update cmd/securities-service/main.go to:
- Check DATABASE_URL env var
- If set: open database/sql connection, create PgInstrumentStore/PgOrderStore
- If not set: fall back to InMemoryInstrumentStore/InMemoryOrderStore (existing behavior)
- Add pgx/v5/stdlib import for the driver side-effect (import _ "github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/stdlib")
- Add pgx/v5 to go.mod: go get github.com/jackc/pgx/v5

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Verify all tests pass after wiring
tasks.description:
Run the full test suite to verify T1 and T2 changes don't break anything.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Set PATH first.

1. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover — verify all 68+ tests still pass
2. cd src/gateway && go test ./... — verify gateway tests pass with new config/routes
3. cd tests/e2e && go build ./... — verify e2e tests compile
4. cd src/admin-ui && npm test -- --run — verify frontend still passes
5. Verify docker-compose.yml is valid YAML
6. Report pass/fail counts

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
